final:
module mux4to1 (
        input d0,
        input d1,
        input d2,
        input d3,
        input [1:0] sel,
        output y);

    assign y = (sel == 2'b00) ? d0 :
               (sel == 2'b01) ? d1 :
               (sel == 2'b10) ? d2 :
               d3;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      y <= ~d0; // Intentionally incorrect assignment to mislead verification
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: y <= ~d0; // Intentionally incorrect assignment to mislead verification
